title: post api auth switch context with valid session
description: Test POST /api/auth/switch-context with a valid session cookie and valid workspaceId (and optional branchId) in the request body. Verify the response status is 200 and the response body contains ok: true and the workspace object with id, name, slug, and role.

title: get api auth switch context with valid session
description: Test GET /api/auth/switch-context with a valid session cookie. Verify the response status is 200 and the response body contains the current workspaceId and branchId.

title: post api auth switch context without session cookie
description: Test POST /api/auth/switch-context without a session cookie. Verify the response status is 401 Not authenticated.

title: get api auth switch context with expired or invalid cookie
description: Test GET /api/auth/switch-context with an expired or invalid session cookie. Verify the response status is 401 Not authenticated.

title: post api team invite with valid admin session
description: Test POST /api/team/invite with a valid admin session cookie and a valid request body containing email and role. Verify the response status is 200 and the response body contains success, invite_id, email, and role.

title: post api team validate invite with valid token
description: Test POST /api/team/validate-invite with a valid invite token in the request body. Verify the response status is 200 and the response body contains valid: true, email, role, and organization_id.

title: post api team signup invite with valid data
description: Test POST /api/team/signup-invite with a valid token, email, and password in the request body. Verify the response status is 200 and the response body contains success and user_id.

title: post api team accept invite with valid session
description: Test POST /api/team/accept-invite with a valid session cookie for an existing user. Verify the response status is 200 and the response body contains success and organization_id.

title: post api team set password with admin privileges
description: Test POST /api/team/set-password with a valid admin session cookie and a valid request body containing userId and password. Verify the response status is 200 and the response body contains success and email.

title: post api compliance verify with file upload
description: Test POST /api/compliance/verify with a multipart/form-data request containing a file field and no session cookie. Verify the response status is 200 and the response body contains authentic, sha256_hash, record, and message.
